name: abilities
description: Skills and tools for AI agents

scripts.ci: bun run lint && bun run typecheck && bun run test && nix flake check && bun run build
scripts.format: bun run format:biome && bun run format:nix && bun run format:md
scripts.lint: bun run lint:biome && bun run lint:nix && bun run lint:md && bun run lint:actions
scripts.lint:nix: git ls-files '*.nix' -z | xargs -0 nixfmt --check && statix check . && deadnix --fail .
